meaning: Product readiness receipt. This proves public setup paths, source mirrors, host MCP contracts and Bankr agent-proof assets. It does not claim third-party adoption or marketplace acceptance.
criteria: agent discovery documents expose exact setup commands
MCP server lists all expected tools
read-only and controlled-write tools are separated
proof package can be found, inspected and install-planned
repo package draft path has no remote write
no secrets or payment requirement are needed for core package workflows

platforms.name: GitHub
platforms.claim: Public open-source mirror and contribution surface.
checks: git ls-remote origin refs/heads/main matches the released commit

platforms.name: Gitlawb
platforms.claim: Gitlawb source flow, package claims, Scout draft and package archive paths are live.
checks: git ls-remote gitlawb refs/heads/main matches the released commit

platforms.name: Codex
platforms.claim: Codex can register Nipmod as a local stdio MCP server through one Nipmod setup command.
checks: nipmod setup codex delegates to the Codex MCP registration path
codex mcp get shows command nipmod and args mcp serve
nipmod mcp serve exposes the expected tool list

platforms.name: Claude Code
platforms.claim: Claude Code can load the committed project .mcp.json and connect to Nipmod.
checks: nipmod setup claude writes a project scoped .mcp.json
claude mcp list reports nipmod connected when nipmod is on PATH

platforms.name: OpenCode
platforms.claim: OpenCode can load the committed opencode.json and connect to Nipmod.
checks: official OpenCode config schema accepts local MCP command arrays
project opencode.json contains nipmod local MCP config
opencode mcp list reports nipmod connected when nipmod is on PATH

platforms.name: Bankr
platforms.claim: Bankr-compatible skill, free service map and agent-proof workflow are public and runnable without wallet actions.
checks: skill can be read from the public site
proof package can be searched, inspected and install-planned
Gitlawb repo package draft is generated locally with remoteWrites false
core package workflows do not require x402 or Nipmod payment
platforms.externalDependency: Native Bankr catalog acceptance is external and not claimed by this receipt.

notClaimed: third-party users have already adopted every host
Bankr has accepted the skill into a native marketplace
wallet, trading, token launch or paid x402 workflows are part of core package use
